    - **DAEMON CATCH-UP IS TODAY'S DOMINANT EVENT**: All six weekday-assigned C2A2 specialist agents (Levin+Friston, Hawkins+Hoffman, McGilchrist+Kastrup, Stump+Fredrickson, Carroll+Arkani-Hamed, Wolfram) executed in a single 15:35–16:35 UTC window after Tom's Claude restart cleared the daemon outage. 18 proposals + 1 honest-null produced.     - **DAEMON REGISTRATION BUG IS CONFIRMED ANTHROPIC-SIDE**: Summa-updating-agents session (local_40871db5) diagnosed link-count = 1 tasks silently skipped at registration time. 23 tasks affected across Summa-2026, C2A2 (Wright/Rohr Sunday agent, sewing-agent-weekly), and reminder families.     - **WALK-NOTES PARTIAL RECOVERY**: First non-null walk-notes capture in 12+ consecutive days. Tom's "RC Explorer — Vision for What This Becomes" Gmail self-thread captured at 02:56 UTC and ingested by morning walk handoff. ASSUMPTION-082 records the 3-layer RC Explorer model + 5 integration steps. PRESUMPTION-098 surfaces that the six "decisions" extracted were not promoted to DECISION-NNN.
    - **SPECIALIST-OUTPUT-AS-PRIMARY-SIGNAL CONTINUES TO COMPOUND**: ASSUMPTION-086 codifies that specialist self-tagging of cross-tradition signals is treated as primary signal. Today three specialists made strong claims simultaneously (Stump+Fredrickson on positivity resonance as "strongest current empirical bridge"; Hoffman on TRACE Institute "parallels C2A2's own multi-agent architecture"; Wolfram on PROP-016 advancing CROSS-006/007/015/049). PRESUMPTION-096, PRESUMPTION-097 surface the gaps; PRESUMPTION-100 surfaces a related missing feedback-loop where specialist outputs bear on foundational ASSUMPTION-007 but do not loop back into the registry.
    - **SANDBOX-INFRASTRUCTURE CLUSTER GROWS TO 4 CHANNELS**: today added daemon-registration-bug (ASSUMPTION-080, 081) to the existing OPEN-039 cluster of git-lock + sandbox-mount-topology + egress + browser-auth. The cluster now spans all four canonical sandbox-infrastructure dimensions: scheduling, networking, filesystem, and authentication.
    - **DAEMON-CATCHUP NEW CLUSTER (4 PRESUMPTIONs)**: PRESUMPTION-093 (catch-up structurally equivalent to spread), PRESUMPTION-094 (workaround blast-radius), PRESUMPTION-102 (link-count determinism across creation paths), PRESUMPTION-103 (weekday-of-assignment label convention) form a new cluster surfacing the catch-up scenario as an unexamined operational mode.
    - **TODAY'S 11-TO-9 PRESUMPTION-TO-ASSUMPTION RATIO (1.22:1)**: Moderate, below 2026-04-27's 12:8 high (1.5:1). Today's 9 ASSUMPTIONs are dominated by methodological items (6 of 9: 079, 080, 081, 084, 085, 086) — continuing the methodological-heavy signature of operational-throughput days.
    - **NO NEW OPEN QUESTIONS, NO NEW CANDIDATE DECISIONS, NO INCORPORATEs**: today's failure modes extended existing open questions; six walk-thread "decisions" were not canonized; no 15c run today.
    - **7-DAY 14a/14b GAP** (2026-04-28 through 2026-05-04): Largest self-awareness gap yet observed. Exceeds the 4-day gap that triggered OPEN-038 (master-narrative-gap escalation question). The cause is the same daemon registration bug diagnosed today (ASSUMPTION-080) — the c2a2-self-awareness-daily task likely had link-count = 1 from 2026-04-28 onward and was silently skipped until today's run. Today's run does not backfill the 7-day gap per scheduled-task scope but flags it for future review.

**Trajectory assessment:** Tuesday 2026-05-05 was a **daemon-catch-up day** plus an **architectural-articulation day** — a rare combination. The dominant operational signal was the daemon registration bug that silently held all of 2026-04-28 through 2026-05-04's scheduled tasks (including the seven daily 14a/14b runs that were skipped) and the catch-up batch that fired today after Tom's Claude restart. The dominant architectural signal was the 3-layer RC Explorer model surfaced by today's first non-null walk-notes day in 12+ days. Today's 11-to-9 presumption-to-assumption ratio (1.22:1) is moderate, but the new clusters (DAEMON-CATCHUP, FEEDBACK-LOOP-MISSING) and the compounding of PRESUMPTION-074's prior SYSTEMIC-RISK on specialist-recognition reliability via three new same-day items (PRESUMPTION-096, 097, 100) make today's presumptions register a meaningful update on the cross-tradition signal pipeline. **If any one action moves the pipeline forward most**, it is filing a precise bug report with Anthropic about the link-count = 1 silent-skip pattern (ASSUMPTION-080, PRESUMPTION-102) and confirming the `update_scheduled_task --fireAt` workaround at the 17:00 UTC live test (ASSUMPTION-081) — the bug silently drove the 7-day self-awareness gap and likely affects more than the 23 tasks visible today. **If a second**, it is canonizing the six walk-thread-extracted "decisions" (specifically ASSUMPTION-082's 3-layer model + 5 integration steps + Tool #1/Tool #2 ordering) as DECISION-NNN entries to close PRESUMPTION-098's implicit-decision drift. **If a third**, it is adding an automated feedback loop from specialist outputs to the assumptions registry to close PRESUMPTION-100's gap (specifically: McGilchrist+Kastrup's same-day note that "archetypes-precede-instances bears on whether AI agents can inhabit traditions" should automatically be routed to ASSUMPTION-007's evidence record). **And if a fourth**, it is establishing an adjudication step for parallel specialist "strongest bridge" claims (PRESUMPTION-097) so that competing same-day superlatives compose rather than compete silently.
